mapper.select: select id, dish_id, order_id, change_type, change_quantity, available_before, available_after, locked_before, locked_after, operator_id, remark, create_time from stock_record where dish_id = #{dishId} order by create_time asc, id asc

select id, dish_id, order_id, change_type, change_quantity, available_before, available_after, locked_before, locked_after, operator_id, remark, create_time from stock_record where order_id = #{orderId} order by create_time asc, id asc
